title: festuca broteri
intro: Festuca broteri, also known as Broter's fescue, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It is native to the Iberian Peninsula and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which can help to soothe and clear the airways, providing relief from congestion and coughing. Festuca broteri is often used in herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, which can be consumed to take advantage of its health benefits.
